hero.title: Emergency Help,
hero.subtitle: Flash Emergency combines AI-powered guidance, GPS location, and nearby emergency services to help you act fast when every second counts.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything You Need in an Emergency
features.subtitle: Critical tools combined in one place to reduce response time and save lives.
features.nearbyServicesDesc: Find hospitals, clinics, pharmacies, police and fire stations near you instantly.
features.aiFirstAidDesc: Get step-by-step emergency guidance powered by artificial intelligence.
features.shareLocationDesc: Send your exact GPS coordinates to emergency contacts with one tap.
features.voiceControlDesc: Speak your emergency and listen to instructions hands-free.
features.offlineModeDesc: Access saved contacts, guides, and your last known location without internet.
features.sosButtonDesc: One-tap emergency alert that vibrates, shares location, and notifies contacts.
features.emergencyContactsDesc: Save trusted contacts for quick access during emergencies.
features.historyFeatureDesc: Review previous searches and AI conversations for future reference.

cta.title: Be Prepared, Not Scared
cta.subtitle: Emergencies happen without warning. Flash Emergency equips you with the tools to stay calm, act fast, and get the right help.

disclaimer: Flash Emergency is an informational emergency assistant. It does not replace doctors, hospitals, ambulances, or emergency services. Always contact your local emergency number in life-threatening situations.

assistant.title: AI Emergency Assistant
assistant.describeEmergency: Describe your emergency and I will provide step-by-step first aid guidance. You can type or use voice input.
assistant.disclaimer: This assistant does not replace professional medical services. Always call emergency services in life-threatening situations.

prompts.heartAttack: Someone is having a heart attack

contacts.title: Emergency Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Trusted people to alert during emergencies.
contacts.noContactsDesc: Add trusted contacts to quickly share your location during emergencies.
contacts.name: Name

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Previous searches and AI conversations.
history.noHistoryDesc: Your emergency searches and AI conversations will appear here.
history.localOnly: History is stored locally on this device only.

sos.title: SOS Emergency
sos.subtitle: Share your location quickly
sos.locationUnavailable: Location unavailable. Enable GPS for full functionality.
sos.locationError: Location not available. Please enable GPS.
sos.disclaimer: Always contact your local emergency number in life-threatening situations.

offline.message: You are offline. Some features may be limited.

install.title: Install Flash Emergency
install.subtitle: Install for quick access and offline support.

notFound.message: Page not found. The page you are looking for does not exist.

footer.disclaimer: Informational emergency assistant only. Does not replace professional medical services.

profile.title: Medical Profile
profile.subtitle: Your emergency medical information
profile.name: Name
profile.localNotice: This information is stored only on your device. No data is sent to any server.

report.title: Photo Report
report.subtitle: Document an emergency with photo and description

errors.locationDenied: Location permission denied. Please enable it in your browser settings.
errors.locationTimeout: The request to get your location timed out.
errors.locationUnknown: An unknown error occurred while getting your location.
errors.geolocationUnsupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
